name: account-transaction
description: Portfolio.AccountTransaction tools on the ayunit MCP. Custody activity loaders (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore/Cayman) parse the export/API feed and insert validated trades + cash/GL movements with live asset/account/lock resolution. Plus batch fixers: duplicate-trade-reconcile (de-dup vs CustodyPosition), compromissada-fix (XP repo normalisation), assetrelated-fix (fills AssetRelated on income, rescues PENDING).
